category_sources: source_facts.description says it converts Microsoft Reader format eBooks into open format; source_facts.homepage is the official convertlit site.
display_name_sources: source_facts.name is convertlit; source_facts.description expands purpose for Microsoft Reader LIT ebook conversion.
docs_sources: source_facts.homepage is the official project homepage and best available documentation surface for this older tool.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo is empty; source_facts.source-archive is an official source ZIP rather than a source-control repository, and no official source-control URL was identified.
tags_sources: source_facts.description identifies Microsoft Reader ebook conversion; source_facts.executables lists clit as the command-line executable.
